chunks.text: 1 Page 1 of 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1847 of 2018 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 27-10-2022 None present for the Petitioner. Mr. Mehboob Ali Wassan, Assistant A.G..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the petitioner. It appears that on previous dates of hearing, learned counsel for the petitioner was directed to come prepared to address the question of maintainability of instant petition, either question involved in this petition can be decided by this Court or by the Sindh Service Tribunal. Admittedly, the petitioner is serving in Excise and Taxation Department as Excise Dafedar (BPS-06) at district Naushehro Feroze and through instant petition he has challenged the holding of office of Incharge DIO Camp Kandiaro by the respondent No.5, who is Excise & Taxation Inspector (BPS-14) and for challenging such transfer and posting order, the petitioner has no locus standi to maintain this petition. Hence, instant petition stands dismissed accordingly. J U D G E J U D G E Ahmad
